item.title: Factors associated with urgent consultation recommendations for patients with inflammatory bowel disease calling a telephone service about worsening symptoms: a secondary analysis.
The effects of intravenous immunoglobulin on intestinal inflammation: a systematic review of animal and clinical studies.
item.description: PeerJ - Systematic review - Intestinal inflammation encompasses a range of conditions, including inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), radiation-induced enteritis, and chemotherapy- or toxin-induced epithelial injury. Although in...

item.title: [Guideline for the Treatment of Ulcerative Colitis and Crohn's Disease in Adult Patients].
item.description: Revista medica de Chile - Systematic review - Ulcerative colitis and Crohn's disease are chronic conditions that can take a potentially severe or even life-threatening course, with high morbidity stemming from their complications. These diseas...
